data.body: PASS 1 (G1G2 — edit-set / scope accuracy): One finding — the stderr-print migration target appears absent in `src/rebar/llm/plan_review/`. Grep for `file=sys.stderr` and `sys.stderr` returns zero matches in the package; the only `print(` hits are the `material_fingerprint` symbol name, not print calls. All other named targets verified present (package + broad-except sites, `.github/module-size-allowlist.txt`, all 42 `# noqa: T201` sites confirmed in `_engine/rebar_reconciler/` and none in CLI, `_cli`/`_commands` dirs exist).
